title: The Secret of the Strawberry Moon

scenes.text: Why is June’s full moon called the Strawberry Moon?
It marks the beginning of strawberry harvesting season in North America.
The moon appears brighter and larger due to its position in the sky.
This full moon also holds cultural significance in many traditions.
scenes.label: CULTURAL SIGNIFICANCE

scenes.text: Follow for daily science that blows your mind.

description: The Strawberry Moon marks strawberry harvest season, appearing larger and brighter. Follow for more lunar facts!
